spec.name: Spell That Waits
spec.summary: A spell that waits to release effects using electric magic.
spec.effect_description: A spell that waits to release effects using electric magic. A triangle trigger/affect recipe that channels electric discipline into shock output. It applies a beam pattern against where written across self reach with immediate persistence.
